title: Build a Restoration Project Manager - Advanced Strategies

body:

Scaling Your Base44 Workflow

Use Base44's advanced features, such as conditional logic and automation, to streamline your processes and reduce manual work. - **Use advanced views**: Base44's views are a powerful feature that allows you to customize the way you see and interact with your data. Use advanced views to create custom dashboards, reports, and charts that give you a clear picture of your workflow. - **Leverage Base44's API**: The Base44 API is a powerful tool that allows you to connect Base44 with other applications and services. Use the API to integrate Base44 with other tools, automate tasks, and create custom workflows. By focusing on these areas, you can scale your Base44 workflow and achieve greater success.

For example, you can create a rule that automatically updates a field when a specific condition is met. - **Use Base44's Zapier integration**: Zapier is a powerful tool that allows you to connect Base44 with other applications and services. Use Zapier to automate tasks and create custom workflows. - **Leverage Base44's scripting capabilities**: Base44's scripting capabilities allow you to create custom scripts that automate tasks and workflows. Use scripting to create custom automations that meet your specific needs. By automating repetitive tasks, you can free up time and focus on more important things.
